meta.method: per-ticker reconstruction from disclosures published on or before each asOf date; independently audited for look-ahead (see basis notes)

ABTC.basis: Nasdaq debut day: Gryphon Digital Mining stock-for-stock merger closed and the renamed American Bitcoin Corp. began trading as ABTC on 2025-09-03 (8-K 2025-09-03). Debut-day PRs put the treasury at ~2,443 BTC accumulated since the 2025-03-31 formation (Hut 8 miner contribution + the June $220M pre-listing placement, HUT 8-K 2025-06-30). Same day the company established a $2.1B at-the-market program (424B5 2025-09-03). Shares: Class B 732.2M (Hut 8) + Class A ~177M pre-ATM (back-walked from the Q3-25 10-Q cover of 195.4M A less 11.0M Sep ATM and 7.2M Oct-Nov ATM sales); price is the as-traded close ~$8.04 (ledger 120.6 post-split-adjusted / 15). No debt; cash was already converted to BTC/miners (6/30/25 cash $0.7M). audit: the Class A back-walk relies on the Q3-25 10-Q cover (filed 2025-11-14, post-asOf) — re-anchored to at-asOf sources: the 2,443 BTC count and Hut 8's ~80% stake were both public on debut day (CoinDesk 2025-09-03), and 732.2M Class B / 0.80 implies ~915M total, so 909M stands (within 1%) on 9/3-dated information alone.

PR of 2025-10-27 (PRNewswire; also carried by CoinDesk): American Bitcoin acquired ~1,414 BTC, lifting the strategic reserve to ~3,865 BTC as of 2025-10-24 — the first big post-listing treasury step-up, and the debut of the Satoshis-Per-Share disclosure cadence. Price ~$5.96 as-traded (ledger 89.4 / 15). Still no debt. audit: the prior ~922M share estimate interpolated from the Q3 10-Q (filed 2025-11-14, post-asOf) — replaced with a same-day public anchor: the 10/27 PR itself discloses SPS 418 as of 10/24, so 3,865 BTC x 1e8 / 418 = ~924.6M shares; shares restated 922 -> 924.6.

Q3-2025 10-Q filed 2025-11-14: first filing-grade capital structure — 195,380,091 Class A + 732,224,903 Class B as of 11/13/2025 (= 927.6M), cash $8.0M, no borrowings; 3,418 BTC held at 9/30/25 (superseded for the treasury count by the 10/24 PR figure of 3,865, which remains the latest public count). ATM usage disclosed: 11.0M shares for ~$90M gross through 9/30 plus 7.2M shares for ~$44M 10/1-11/13. Price ~$4.86 as-traded (ledger 72.9 / 15).

FY2025 results press release (8-K Item 2.02, 2026-02-26): year-end treasury 5,401 BTC as of 12/31/2025 (count later confirmed verbatim in the 10-K filed 2026-03-27). Shares estimated ~1,020M. Price ~$1.08 as-traded (ledger 16.2 / 15) — the stock had collapsed with BTC while the share count multiplied the float. Cash 12/31/25 $3.8M, no debt. audit: (1) the prior share interpolation used the 3/25/26 10-K cover (326.9M Class A) — post-asOf; re-anchored on <=asOf data only: the same-day FY-results PR discloses SPS ~554 at 12/31/25, implying ~975M shares at year-end (~243M A + 732.2M B), and the ATM run-rate observable at asOf (195.4M A on the 11/13 cover -> ~243M implied 12/31, ~1M A shares/day) extrapolates to ~1,020-1,030M by 2/26 — 1,020 kept, now grounded without the future filing. (2) treasury restated 5,401 -> 6,235: the 2/24/2026 purchase PR (+392 BTC, to 6,235) was the latest public count at asOf, and the 2/26 PR itself notes holdings had 'since grown to more than 6,000' — matches this file's latest-public-count convention (cf. the 11/14/25 snapshot carrying the 10/24 figure over the 9/30 filing count).

Q1-2026 10-Q filed 2026-05-06: 7,021 BTC held at 3/31/2026 (BTC marked ~$68,222); 330,788,302 Class A + 732,224,903 Class B as of 5/4/2026 (= 1,063.0M); cash $10.1M, no borrowings; cumulative ATM from inception to 3/31/26 was 149.55M Class A shares for ~$351M gross. Price ~$1.25 as-traded (ledger 18.75 / 15). audit: treasury restated 7,021 -> 7,300 — the same-day Q1 results PR (2026-05-06) headlines 'over 7,300 Bitcoin' as the CURRENT count (7,021 is the 3/31 quarter-end figure); latest-public-count convention, all sources dated <=asOf.

1-for-15 reverse split — approved at the 6/22/2026 annual meeting, announced 2026-07-01 (PR: 'effective 5:00 p.m. July 2, 2026', split-adjusted trading from 7/6 under the same symbol, 8-K abtc-20260702) — done to cure the sub-$1 Nasdaq bid-price risk. Stated on the post-split basis effective at this date: ~72.8M shares (~1,092M / 15), price $8.43 split-adjusted equivalent of the 7/2 as-traded close ~$0.562 (ledger 8.4255). Treasury 7,500 BTC — the latest public count at asOf (purchase PR 2026-05-18, +200 BTC); the 8,000-BTC milestone is 2026-07-06/07 and must NOT appear here. audit: (1) treasury restated 7,200 -> 7,500 — the 7,200 figure was tracker-internal and matches NO public disclosure (public trail: 7,021 at 3/31 filed 5/6, 'over 7,300' in the 5/6 PR, 7,500 on 5/18; company states it does not sell). (2) shares restated 70.9M -> 72.8M post-split — the 7/1/2026 split PR (public before asOf) discloses ~360M Class A + 732M Class B ~= 1,092M pre-split => ~72.8M at 1-for-15; the prior 1,063.5M was the stale 5/4 10-Q cover. A backtest marking 7/2 on the raw pre-split tape should use ~1,092M shares @ $0.562 (same market cap). (3) netDebt restated -50 -> -10 — the -$50M '6/30 verification' has no public source dated <=7/2; last filing-grade figure is Q1 10-Q cash $10.1M at 3/31, and interim ATM proceeds net of the ~200-BTC purchases are not publicly quantifiable at asOf. · correction: restored PRE-split share count/price basis — the 1:15 reverse split became effective 2026-07-07, after this asOf (post-split figures were a 5-day look-ahead).

APLD.basis: Baseline. PR/8-K 6/2/25: two ~15-yr CoreWeave leases, 250MW at Ellendale ND (~$7B total revenue) — Bldg A 100MW guided RFS Q4 CY2025, Bldg B 150MW mid-2026, plus an UNEXERCISED CoreWeave option on a third 150MW building guided 2027 (planning stage → estimated, uncontracted). Latest filing = Q3 FY25 10-Q (2/28/25, filed 4/14/25): $261.2M cash+restricted vs $689.1M debt — ex the $450M 2.75% '30 convert (counted in FD shares per §5a) net debt ~$0; SMBC $375M construction facility drawing after quarter-end, so ~$50M carried conservatively. Cloud Services (GPU cloud, up-to-$180M Sai contract) + ~286MW crypto-hosting still owned and marked for exit → legacyEV. Price 10.56 = repo ledger close 6/26/25.

Price 15.98 = ledger close 8/29/25. audit: plannedRaise 450→400 — 450 exactly matched the Second Amendment upsize ($300M→$450M, 8-K 9/12/25), disclosed 14 days AFTER this asOf; as of 8/29 the disclosed PEPA capacity was $300M, so the baseline ~400 judgment is carried instead.

PR/8-K 10/22/25: second campus lease — Polaris Forge 2 (Harwood ND), ~$5B / 200MW / 15yr with a US investment-grade hyperscaler; construction already under way (Macquarie Equipment Capital note 8-K 9/12/25 funded PF2 land/transformers/early works). Harwood billed as scalable well beyond the leased 200MW → 300MW expansion carried rumored. Capital stack turned: first funding under the Macquarie $5B perpetual-preferred program 10/7/25 ($112.5M + 7.5% SPV common → seniorClaims ~115) and PEPA upsized to $1.59B (8-K 10/21/25). Q1 FY26 10-Q (8/31/25) basis + PEPA conversions → shares ~310, netDebt ~250. Price 30.62 = ledger close 10/22/25.

BTBT.basis: Pre-WhiteFiber-IPO Bit Digital: AI infra held directly (Enovum MTL-1 4MW live since Oct-2024; Cerebras 5MW colo signed Feb-2025, re-pointed to leased MTL-3 Saint-Jerome per 2025-04-11 PR with July-2025 go-live target; NC-1 Madison NC PSA signed 2025-04-10, $53.2M, 24MW initial / up to 99MW), GPU cloud carried in legacyEV. On 2025-06-25/26 the ETH-pivot offering priced: 75M shares at $2.00 ($150M gross, close 6/27; PR 2025-06-26) — shares and cash included, ETH still the last-disclosed 24,434 (10-Q, 3/31/25). Shares 182.8M (10-Q 3/31/25) + 75M offering. audit: btc restored to 417.6 — the last-disclosed count (Q1-25 results PR/10-Q, 5/15/25); the prior 280 leaked the 2025-07-07 PR's '~280 BTC sold' back to this date.

PR 2025-07-07 (8-K ex.99): treasury shift complete — ~$172M gross from the underwritten offering (greenshoe 11.25M shares exercised 7/1) plus sale of ~280 BTC, all deployed into ETH; holdings ~100,603 ETH. Stock +26% on the announcement (CoinDesk 7/7/25). BTC now 0; shares 269M (182.8 + 86.25); raise proceeds fully converted to ETH so netDebt reverts to the modest pre-raise net-cash position. AI sites unchanged from 6/26 record.

Registered direct priced 2025-07-14 (PR + 424B5 accepted 5:06pm ET), closed 7/15 (8-K): 22.0M ordinary shares at $3.06 vs $3.33 prior close, $67.3M gross, B. Riley sole agent; proceeds earmarked for ETH purchases but not yet deployed/disclosed — ETH held at the last-disclosed 100,603 (PR 7/7), cash from the raise sits in netDebt. Shares 291M. WhiteFiber F-1 for a proposed IPO of the AI unit is on file (publicly flagged late June-2025) but the unit is still 100% held, so sites remain on BTBT. audit: eth cut from 120,286 to 100,603 and netDebt from -50 to -114 — the ~19,683-ETH purchase (→ ~120,306 total) was only disclosed in the 2025-07-18 PR, after this asOf; until then the ~$64M net proceeds are cash.

WhiteFiber (WYFI) IPO: upsized 9.375M shares priced $17 on 2025-08-06/07 (Bloomberg, Renaissance Capital), completed 2025-08-08; Bit Digital retains ~73% on the base deal (prospectus; over-allotment still an unexercised 30-day option at this date). BTBT becomes a holdco from this date: the AI sites, Cerebras lease and GPU cloud move behind the separately-listed stake; what remains at BTBT is the ~120.3k-ETH treasury (PR 2025-07-18: ~120,306) and a small legacy BTC-mining residual. Shares 291M; no new BTBT-level debt. audit: stake raised 0.71 → 0.73 — the ~71% figure is post-greenshoe, and the underwriters only exercised the 1,406,250-share option on 2025-09-02 (BTBT/WYFI filings), after this asOf; eth set to the disclosed 120,306.

Convertible launched after close 2025-09-29: $100M proposed 4.00% senior notes due 2030, stated use purchase ETH (8-K + 424B5 accepted ~4:17pm ET 9/29). At this asOf only the $100M proposal is public — carried as debt at proposed size (conversion out of the money at ~$3.1 stock), ETH still the last-disclosed ~120,306 (PR 7/18). Shares unchanged at 291M (notes as debt, not if-converted); stake 0.71 valid since the WYFI greenshoe exercised 2025-09-02. audit: netDebt cut 100 → 50 — the upsize to $135M priced overnight (FWP 9/30) and the $15M shoe → $150M total settled 10/2, all after this asOf; eth set to the disclosed 120,306.

Monthly ETH treasury PR 2025-11-07 (8-K ex.99): 153,547 ETH as of 10/31/25 (~$590.5M), including ~31,057 ETH bought with the convert proceeds; ~86% staked. Also reflects the 2025-10-31 S-3ASR + amended H.C. Wainwright sales agreement lifting the ATM cap $500M → $2.5B for ETH accumulation — treated as self-funding (buys ETH ~1:1), so plannedRaise stays 0. Convert remains as debt (stock ~$2.6 vs $4.16 conversion). Shares held at 291M — no material ATM issuance disclosed by this date.

Q1-2026 10-Q (filed 2026-05-15) plus the 2025 10-K: the ATM has crept shares to the ~349M fully-diluted / 353.4M reported level; ETH treasury at the ~158.5k count carried in the current book; consolidated net debt ~$313M (the $150M 4% convert plus consolidated WhiteFiber-level facilities). WYFI's in-the-money convert and post-IPO issuance dilute BTBT's look-through economics to ~57.7% (~29.1M WYFI shares over ~50.5M FD) even though the held share count still reads ~70% basic. This snapshot matches the tracker's verified state (capital verified 2026-07-02).

BTDR.basis: Q1'25 6-K (5/15/25): cash $215.6M, borrowings $215.4M, 1,156 BTC, Clarington mining build PAUSED for 'advanced discussions with development partners and potential end users for HPC/AI' (Northland engaged March); site table shows Clarington ph1 266MW 'Paused TBD' + ph2 304MW 'Pending approval TBD'. $330M+option=$375M 4.875% converts due 2031 priced 6/18/25, closed 6/23 (conv ~$15.88), with concurrent exchange of the 8.50% Aug-2024 notes for cash+shares. AI story = one rumored 570MW HPC block + a sub-$1.5M/q GPU-cloud sleeve; everything else is mining/ASIC (legacyEV). netDebt is a principal-basis estimate: Mar-31 BS + June convert net (+$375M debt, ~+$200M cash after zero-strike call and note exchange) + $156.3M drawn under the April Matrixport related-party facility (disclosed as of 6/17/25 in the offering 6-K 'Recent Update' exhibit). Close 6/26/25 $11.21. audit: Matrixport draw restored to the contemporaneously disclosed $156.3M (was ~$180M, an unsourced extrapolation whose only anchor is the later 9/29/25 H1 interim); netDebt 720→700.

Q2'25 6-K (8/18/25): cash $299.8M, IFRS borrowings $533.1M + $438.0M convert derivative liabilities (principal-basis total debt ~$975M incl $400M 5.25%'29 + $375M 4.875%'31 + $180M Matrixport), 1,502 BTC (6/30), HPC/AI Cloud revenue just $1.3M/q. AEP Ohio Letter of Agreement signed in July for Clarington ph2 — full 570MW path firmed; infra table (7/31) now dates Clarington 'In progress Q2 2027'. HPC/AI still one rumored dev-partner block ('optimistic to share more details in coming months'). Close 8/18/25 $14.36.

September production update (PR 10/14/25): the pivot — LOI with the development partner allowed to expire; Bitdeer takes the direct HPC/AI landlord role (negotiating directly with tenants, EPCs, in-house hires); utility confirms all 570MW at Clarington by end Q3'26 (substation H1'27); plans announced to convert Tydal ph2 (175MW) to AI and accelerate HPC/AI at Clarington/Tydal/Wenatchee; potential ARR '>$2B end-2026'; Bitdeer.AI cloud ARR $8M (584 GPUs). Niles OH 300MW site launched (41.8 owned acres, FirstEnergy interconnect, target Q1'29). Capital: H1 interim (9/29/25) disclosed July upsize of April Matrixport facility to $400M fully drawn + NEW Sept facility up to $400M — netDebt estimated ~$950M (Sep-30 actual later printed $1,067M principal-basis). Close 10/14/25 $20.12 (pre-pivot-pop; +29% next day).

Q3'25 6-K (11/10/25): Sep-30 cash $196.3M, principal-basis total debt $1,263M (424B5 cap table: $400M 5.25%'29 + $375M 4.875%'31 + $461.6M Matrixport + $26.5M facility), 2,029 BTC; shares 177.34M Class A + 44.40M Class V = 221.7M. Then 11/12-11/13: $400M 4.00% converts due 2031 priced (conv ~$17.77, capped calls) + 10.66M-share registered direct at $13.94 (~$148.6M), proceeds repurchase $200M of the 5.25% 2029 notes; Oct Matrixport facility up to $100M fully drawn (424B5 'Recent Developments'). Post-deal netDebt ~$1.1B est. Sites unchanged from the October pivot disclosure. Close 11/13/25 $11.11 (deal-day pressure).

FY2025 6-K (2/12/26) prints the first full crypto-to-AI conversion table (as of 1/31/26): Knoxville ph1 37MW, Wenatchee 13MW, Tydal-1 50MW, Tydal-2 175MW all 'converting to AI, Q4 2026'; Rockdale 563MW 'evaluating AI'; Clarington 570MW HPC/AI 'to be updated'; Niles 300MW HPC/AI Q4 2028. Dec-31 BS: cash $149.4M, total debt $1,522.8M (424B5 cap table: $200M 5.25%'29 remnant + $400M 4.00%'31 + $375M 4.875%'31 + $521.8M Matrixport + $26M facility); 2,017 BTC; shares 191.15M A + 44.40M V = 235.6M. Then 2/19-2/20: $325M 5.00% converts due 2032 (conv ~$9.90) + 5.50M-share RD at $7.94, repurchasing $135M of 5.25%'29; Dec/Jan Matrixport facilities + 800-BTC loan first disclosed in the prelim 424B5. Post-deal netDebt ~$1.37B est. Jan-2026 production update (2/10/26): AI-cloud ARR ~$10M (1,792 GPUs, 41% util), 1,530 BTC held at 1/31/26; its infra table shows Rockdale 563MW online 'Crypto / Evaluating AI' while the separate 179MW Rockdale pipeline row is designated Crypto-in-planning. Close 2/20/26 $7.78. audit: removed the ARR-$21M reference (published 3/16/26, after asOf) and cut contractedPct 2→1 — known ARR at asOf was ~$10M; btc 2,017→1,530 (freshest pre-asOf print, 2/10/26); Rockdale carried at the disclosed 563MW 'evaluating AI' block as rumored — the 179MW-as-AI designation first appears in the Apr-2026 roadmap and was a look-ahead.

PR 3/30/26: Tydal Data Center AS engages DCI (Sparc Group) as design-and-construction partner — 180MW gross installed AI colocation to Nvidia Vera Rubin reference design, completion 'as early as December 2026'; would be Norway's largest AI datacenter. Feb-2026 production update (3/16/26): Wenatchee/Knoxville-ph1/Tydal-1/Tydal-2 conversions held at Q4'26 and Knoxville ph2 (49MW) newly dated Q1'27 'converting to AI Cloud'; advanced tenant negotiations for BOTH Tydal and Clarington; AI-cloud ARR ~$21M / 2,096 GPUs (2/28); BTC held 51 at 2/28 — treasury effectively liquidated. Rockdale still 563MW online 'Crypto / Evaluating converting to Colocation or AI Cloud'. Capital unchanged since the late-Feb closing of the convert/RD (netDebt ~$1.37B est., shares ~241M). Close 3/30/26 $7.88. audit: btc 2,017→51 (2/28 count disclosed 3/16/26, before asOf — old value overstated treasury ~40x); Knoxville ph2 49MW Q1'27 added (disclosed 3/16/26, was missing); Rockdale carried at the disclosed 563MW 'evaluating' block as rumored — the 179MW-as-AI designation first appears in the Apr-2026 roadmap and was a look-ahead.

Q1'26 6-K (5/14/26, first US-GAAP quarter): Mar-31 cash+restricted $297.7M (~$261M cash), borrowings ~$1.92B → netDebt ~$1.66B straight; here the deep-ITM $325M 5.00%'32 notes (conv $9.90 vs $14.75) are equitized: netDebt ~$1.34B, shares ~243M reported + ~33M convert + ~10M RSU = 286M FD. Roadmap (4/30/26): Knoxville ph1 37MW Q4'26 + ph2 49MW Q1'27, Wenatchee 13MW Q4'26 (mining dismantled since March), Tydal-1 50 + Tydal-2 175 Q4'26 (DCI engaged, long-lead orders placed), Rockdale 179MW 'Colocation/AI Cloud In Planning 2026', Cyberjaya 2MW online AI cloud + 9.5MW Q4'26, Niles 300 Q4'28. Clarington litigation (American Heavy Plate Solutions) first disclosed — timing 'to be updated'. 'Advanced stages of negotiations with a credit-worthy colocation tenant for Tydal.' April update (5/12): BTC held 73 — treasury liquidated. Close 5/14/26 $14.75.

6-K/PR 6/29/26: Tydal Data Center AS executes a colocation lease for the Tydal AI site — NOT yet effective, tenant/terms undisclosed, conditions precedent beyond Bitdeer's control; details promised 'within the next month'. May update (6/18/26): AI-cloud ARR ~$69M, 4,248 GPUs at 90% utilization, 171 BTC held; Knoxville ph2 re-dated Q1'27, active tenant dialogue in Ohio/Texas. Capital per the tracker's audited 6/30/26 view (if-converted at ~$16-18: deep/at-the-money converts equitized): netDebt $444M, 350M FD shares; the tracker's site dating (Wenatchee Oct'26, Tydal ph2 and Rockdale mid-'27 vs company Q4'26 guidance, Clarington split 300/270 rumored on litigation) reflects its period judgment. Close 6/29/26 $15.86.

CIFR.basis: Cipher Mining as the record showed it: Q1'25 PR (5/6/25) — 2.8 GW pipeline, Barber Lake HPC tenants under NDA + Fortress JV term sheet, Black Pearl Ph1 energizing for MINING; no HPC lease signed. Balance sheet from Q1 10-Q (3/31/25: cash $23M, ~371M shares) rolled for the $172.5M 1.75% convert (closed 5/22/25, conv ~$4.91 — OTM at $4.19, kept as debt) and heavy ATM issuance. Stingray (100MW, acq. Nov-24) and Reveille (70MW, acq. 2024) were disclosed crypto/HPC-optional land; the rest of the 2.8GW was unnamed exclusivity — carried as one rumored row.
